## Summary
- What changed and why?

## Type of change
- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] chore

## Risk and impact
- Main risks:
- Affected areas:
- What is intentionally not changed:

## Validation
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Manual validation performed (describe below)

### Manual validation notes
- 

## GitFlow compliance (required)
- [ ] Branch name follows GitFlow (`feature/*`, `release/*`, `hotfix/*`)
- [ ] No direct commit to `main`
- [ ] Base branch follows GitFlow intent for this change

## Checklist
- [ ] Scope is small and focused
- [ ] Commit messages are clear
- [ ] Docs updated when needed
